title: Roughneck Micro Shovel, Heavy-Duty Square Blade, Short Shaft for Small, Compact Spaces, to Shovel Material Out of Bulk Bags - 690mm (27")
features: Ideal for digging and shovelling material out of bulk bags when working in confined spaces
With a heavy-duty carbon steel blade and steel reinforced Power Ring socket, it offers the strength of much larger shovels with the convenience of a shorter length shaft
Soft grip full-size double-injected "D" grip handle for comfort in use
Heat treated carbon steel corrosion resistant blade with foot treads
Lightweight fibreglass handle eliminates shrinkage, expansion and rotting
description: From the manufacturer Micro length handle Small yet mighty, Roughneck micro shovels offer the strength of much larger shovels with the convenience of a shorter length shaft. Ideal for shovelling material from bulk bags or working in confined spaces. Full size soft grip D-shape handle Roughneck micro shovels feature full size handles. Double injected, soft grip, for comfort in use.
